articles.title: ‘Feisty I think is the word’: The Boston vs. New York rivalry arrives in NWSL for Legacy FC’s debut
articles.description:
“We are here in this league, and we are going to be physical.”

The post ‘Feisty I think is the word’: The Boston vs. New York rivalry arrives in NWSL for Legacy FC’s debut appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Legacy FC debuted in the NWSL, facing Gotham FC on March 14, 2026.
The match highlighted the historic Boston vs. New York sports rivalry.
Local fans can expect a more competitive women's soccer scene in Boston.
